title: MWC 2026: These upcoming camera phones take a page out of Nothing’s Essential Space playbook
summary: The company will also showcase new concepts in Barcelona next month.
body: Credit: TECNO Uganda TL;DR TECNO has revealed what we should expect from the brand at Mobile World Congress next month. The company will unveil the CAMON 50 series of camera-focused phones, although an official listing has already revealed many details. It will also showcase the POVA 8 series of phones, various ecosystem products, and some concept devices. TECNO is one of the more notable smartphone brands globally, and that’s largely due to its strong market share in the Middle East and Africa. The company is a fixture at Mobile World Congress (MWC), and it’s just outlined what we should expect at MWC 2026. For starters, TECNO said it would show off the CAMON 50 series of camera-focused phones in Barcelona. The firm says these phones will use AI to offer smarter scene recognition, “enhanced processing intelligence,” and improved creative flexibility. The company also hinted at AI features for content creation and task management.
